trust.title: Trusted by modern transport and logistics companies
solutions.title: Track your fleet and reduce costs — with MyFleet
solutions.subtitle: Europe's modern cloud platform for fleet management. Some of the key capabilities:
solutions.tracking.title: Know where every vehicle is — 24/7
solutions.tracking.desc: Real-time tracking and tracing for trucks, vans and assets.
solutions.fuel.title: Reduce fuel and maintenance costs
solutions.fuel.desc: Monitor driver behavior and optimize vehicle usage.
solutions.workflow.title: Digitize your workflows
solutions.workflow.desc: Connect office, drivers and vehicles in one platform.
solutions.routes.title: Stay on the right routes
solutions.routes.desc: Assign drivers, vehicles and shifts efficiently.
solutions.service.title: Improve your service
solutions.service.desc: Manage requests, handovers and job updates seamlessly.
solutions.compliant.title: Stay compliant
solutions.compliant.desc: Track documents, licenses and regulatory deadlines.
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.1.quote: Fleet ERP simplified our daily operations. Drivers, vehicles and documents are finally in one place.
testimonials.1.name: Johannes Andersen
testimonials.2.quote: Leave requests and route approvals used to take hours. Now our office handles everything in minutes.
testimonials.2.name: Michael Cames
testimonials.3.quote: Compliance alerts alone saved us from multiple missed inspection deadlines this year.
testimonials.3.name: Ulf Tonne
split.liveTracking.title: Track your vehicles in real time
split.liveTracking.desc: Locate your vehicles on a clear map view and see whether they are parked or on the move. Choose the best-suited driver for a new job to minimize time on the road and keep service levels high.
split.liveTracking.imageAlt: Vehicle tracking on desktop, tablet and smartphone
split.planning.title: Complete more jobs every day
split.planning.desc: Seamless communication between your office and drivers improves workflow management. With accurate ETAs you keep customers satisfied and optimize daily assignments.
split.compliance.title: Stay compliant without the paperwork chaos
split.compliance.desc: Track license expiry dates, vehicle inspections, tachograph records and employment documents. Get alerts before deadlines and keep your fleet audit-ready.
driver.title: Manage Drivers In One Place
driver.desc: Store driver information, licenses, contracts, leave requests and accident history.
features.title: Everything you need to run your fleet
features.subtitle: From driver records to live tracking — manage every part of your operation in one place.
features.driver.title: Driver Management
features.driver.desc: Manage licenses, contracts, leave requests and driver records.
features.vehicle.title: Vehicle Management
features.vehicle.desc: Track vehicles, maintenance, inspections and handovers.
features.documents.title: Document Management
features.documents.desc: Store contracts, licenses and fleet documentation.
features.tracking.title: Live Tracking
features.tracking.desc: Monitor vehicle and driver locations in real time.
features.planning.title: Planning
features.planning.desc: Assign drivers, vehicles and shifts efficiently.
features.compliance.title: Compliance
features.compliance.desc: Track expiry dates and stay compliant with regulations.
savings.title: How much could you save?
savings.desc: See how fleet management can reduce fuel costs, admin time and compliance risks for your operation.
why.title: Why MyFleet?
cta.title: Ready to transform your fleet operation?
cta.desc: Book a demo today and speak with a fleet management specialist.
footer.tagline: Cloud fleet management for transport and logistics companies across Europe.
